subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Ziyarih
subcodes.first_line: The first splendor that dawned and shone forth from the Dayspring of eternity, and the first light that gleamed from the Horizon of glory, and the first mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اول بهاء ظهر و اشرق عن مشرق البقا و اول ضیاء لاح عن مطلع السنا و اول رحمه
subcodes.subjects: @visitation Tablets, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for forgiveness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
